---
title: "Pneumologie"
---

## ERS Guidelines {#ers .outil-heading}

```{=html}
<div class="outil" id="ers">
<div class="outil-header">
<a href="https://www.ersnet.org/guidelines-and-statements/" class="outil-logo" target="_blank">
<img src="../images/logos/ers.png" alt="ERS Guidelines">
</a>
<div class="outil-meta">
<a href="https://www.ersnet.org/guidelines-and-statements/" class="outil-nom" target="_blank">ERS Guidelines</a>
<div class="outil-source">
European Respiratory Society
<br><span class="outil-access gratuit">Gratuit sans inscription</span>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p class="outil-description">À compléter.</p>
<details class="outil-details">
<summary>Détails</summary>
<div class="outil-details-content">À compléter.</div>
</details>
</div>
```

## GINA {#gina .outil-heading}

```{=html}
<div class="outil" id="gina">
<div class="outil-header">
<a href="https://ginasthma.org/" class="outil-logo" target="_blank">
<img src="../images/logos/gina.png" alt="GINA">
</a>
<div class="outil-meta">
<a href="https://ginasthma.org/" class="outil-nom" target="_blank">GINA</a>
<div class="outil-source">
Global Initiative for Asthma
<br><span class="outil-access gratuit">Gratuit sans inscription</span>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p class="outil-description">À compléter.</p>
<details class="outil-details">
<summary>Détails</summary>
<div class="outil-details-content">À compléter.</div>
</details>
</div>
```

## GOLD {#gold .outil-heading}

```{=html}
<div class="outil" id="gold">
<div class="outil-header">
<a href="https://goldcopd.org/" class="outil-logo" target="_blank">
<img src="../images/logos/gold.png" alt="GOLD">
</a>
<div class="outil-meta">
<a href="https://goldcopd.org/" class="outil-nom" target="_blank">GOLD</a>
<div class="outil-source">
Global Initiative for Chronic Obstructive Lung Disease
<br><span class="outil-access gratuit">Gratuit sans inscription</span>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p class="outil-description">À compléter.</p>
<details class="outil-details">
<summary>Détails</summary>
<div class="outil-details-content">À compléter.</div>
</details>
</div>
```

## SPLF — Recommandations {#splf .outil-heading}

```{=html}
<div class="outil" id="splf">
<div class="outil-header">
<a href="https://splf.fr/recommandations/" class="outil-logo" target="_blank">
<img src="../images/logos/splf.png" alt="SPLF — Recommandations">
</a>
<div class="outil-meta">
<a href="https://splf.fr/recommandations/" class="outil-nom" target="_blank">SPLF — Recommandations</a>
<div class="outil-source">
Société de Pneumologie de Langue Française
<br><span class="outil-access gratuit">Gratuit sans inscription</span>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<p class="outil-description">À compléter.</p>
<details class="outil-details">
<summary>Détails</summary>
<div class="outil-details-content">À compléter.</div>
</details>
</div>
```
